movement.name: CMD_SPEED_CTRL
movement.notes: Recommended for WAVE ROVER. L/R range -0.5 to +0.5. On WAVE ROVER without encoders this is PWM percentage, not measured speed.

movement.name: CMD_PWM_INPUT
movement.notes: Raw PWM debug control. L/R range -255 to +255. Low PWM may not overcome motor deadband.

movement.name: CMD_ROS_CTRL
movement.notes: Wiki says only for UGV01 with encoder; do not use as true closed-loop velocity control on stock WAVE ROVER.
